title: Iranian foreign minister meets with Putin as U.S.-Iran talks falter
summary_full: The trip comes as Iranian negotiators seek separate tracks for a deal over the Strait of Hormuz and talks on broader peace, including nuclear issues.
summary_public: The trip comes as Iranian negotiators seek separate tracks for a deal over the Strait of Hormuz and talks on broader peace, including nuclear issues.

IR.label: neutral
